---
name: Bug report
about: Something parses incorrectly or crashes
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Chart file**
- Format: S-57 / S-101
- Source: NOAA / UKHO / other
- Cell name (e.g. US5MA12M) — do NOT attach the file if it requires a license

**To reproduce**
```typescript
// Minimal code that reproduces the issue
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (error message, wrong output, etc.).

**Environment**
- Runtime: Node.js / Bun / browser (which)
- Package version: @s57-parser/xxx@x.x.x
- OS: Windows / macOS / Linux
